compress_provider_id.description: Optional provider id override for compression. When set, overrides AstrBot core `provider_settings.llm_compress_provider_id`. `provider <id>` on the command line overrides this.
compress_provider_id.hint: e.g. deepseek-v3, gpt-4o-mini. Leave empty to use core config.

keep_recent_ratio.description: Default keep_recent_ratio passed to LLMSummaryCompressor. Clamped to [0, 0.3]. `keep <0~0.3>` on the command line overrides this.

instruction_text.description: Optional custom summary instruction. Empty uses the built-in default.
instruction_text.hint: Natural language guidance for the summarizer.

min_messages.description: Below this message count, /compact replies with a hint and skips compression.

show_summary.description: Reply with a short Chinese message indicating success and (if available) the summary.

summary_max_chars.description: Maximum number of characters of the LLM summary to inline in the reply.

default_focus.description: Default focus topic to append to every /compact run. Empty means no default focus.
default_focus.hint: e.g. 鉴权重构. Use `/compact set focus <text>` to change at runtime.
